_comment: PERF-06 committed per-route JS budget (gzipped, kB). Generated by `pnpm build && pnpm check:bundle-budget` — routes are directories under .next/server/app matching a page_client-reference-manifest.js. Ceilings are baseline (2026-07-06, Next 16.2.10/Turbopack) + ~15% headroom. Bump a ceiling only with a deliberate reason (new dependency, new client tree); CI fails if a route silently grows past it.
